title: Excalibur | Quark Delight Support
description: This resource pack redraws the Quark Delight mod in the Excalibur style
body:
![Ссылки](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Starwine-Studios/branding/refs/heads/main/rtf/ssilin.png)
[![Discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Starwine-Studios/branding/refs/heads/main/rtf/discord.png)](https://discord.com/invite/BZHgF65Xp6)
[![Modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Starwine-Studios/branding/refs/heads/main/rtf/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Guardian_50)
[![CurseForge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Starwine-Studios/branding/refs/heads/main/rtf/curseforge.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/guardian_50)
![Описание|Description](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Starwine-Studios/branding/refs/heads/main/rtf/opides.png)
![ENG](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Starwine-Studios/branding/refs/heads/main/rtf/eng.png)

This resource pack redraws the [Quark delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-delight) mod in the [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) style

To redraw the [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) mod, you can use the resource pack: [Excalibur | Farmer's Delight Support](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excalibur-farmers-delight-support)

To redraw the [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) mod, you can use the resource pack: [Excalibur Quark Support](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-quark-support)

![RU](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Starwine-Studios/branding/refs/heads/main/rtf/ru.png)

Этот пакет ресурсов перерисовывает мод [Quark delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-delight) в стиле [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)

Для перерисовки мода [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) вы можете использовать ресурс пак: [Excalibur | Farmer's Delight Support](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excalibur-farmers-delight-support)

Для перерисовки мода [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) вы можете использовать ресурс пак: [Excalibur Quark Support](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-quark-support)

![Предметы|Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d770961fd8031a5cbe4b67b8c125956985897d0a_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96d703bf6d484cb6dec41d5373891ff69f6b2ee5.png)
